scripts.dev: npm run build -w @player2/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,app,admin -c yellow,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @player2/shared" "npm run dev -w @player2/api" "npm run dev -w @player2/app" "npm run dev -w @player2/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @player2/shared && npm run build -w @player2/api && npm run build -w @player2/app && npm run build -w @player2/admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @player2/shared && npm run test -w @player2/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @player2/shared && npm run typecheck -w @player2/api && npm run typecheck -w @player2/app && npm run typecheck -w @player2/admin
